Engineering Physics.gre_importance: high (GRE Physics subject test for top programs)

general_advice.when_to_consider_ms: If you want deep specialisation, career switch, or higher salary ceiling
general_advice.when_to_consider_phd: Only if you genuinely love research and are okay with 4-6 year timeline
general_advice.cgpa_importance: Very high — below 8.0 from IIT significantly limits options
general_advice.research_papers: Even one conference paper dramatically improves PhD admit chances
general_advice.timeline: Apply in September-December of final year for next-year enrollment
